title: eryngium gruinum
intro: Eryngium gruinum, also known as sea holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eryngium gruinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
